category_sources: Official preCICE documentation says its main component is a library for partitioned multi-physics simulations.
source_facts.description describes preCICE as a coupling library for partitioned multi-physics simulations.
display_name_sources: Official preCICE website and documentation use the branded capitalization preCICE.
source_facts.homepage points to the official preCICE site.
docs_sources: Official preCICE documentation page provides installation, configuration, tooling, adapters, API, and simulation-running docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: Official preCICE docs describe solver coupling, adapters, scientific simulation workflows, and language bindings.
